title: coleus perrieri
intro: Coleus perrieri, also known as the Madagascar coleus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to Madagascar. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Coleus perrieri include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or extracting the plant's active compounds with a solvent.
